posts.name: Context.dev
posts.tagline: One API to scrape, enrich, and extract the internet
posts.description: Context.dev is the web context API for AI products and agents. Scrape any URL, crawl sites, turn pages into LLM-ready Markdown, extract structured data into your own schema, capture screenshots, and retrieve logos, colors, fonts, styleguides, company data, and transaction enrichment through one API. YC-backed, no card required, and built so developers or coding agents can integrate in minutes.

posts.name: Fypro
posts.tagline: Convert your TikTok followers into paying customers
posts.description: You built a TikTok following that trusts you. Fypro turns those followers into paying customers you actually own. Drop your handle and it reads your account, then builds the whole thing for you: a site from your content, a store stocked with products matched to your niche, videos in your own voice, and a customer and email list that's yours to keep. Trained on 4M+ viral TikToks. Used by 2,000+ creators.

posts.name: Needle
posts.tagline: The proactive GTM agent in Slack and Teams
posts.description: Most sales AI waits for you to ask. Needle is proactive. It works like a GTM engineer on your team: it watches your pipeline and acts before you do. Spots stalled deals and drafts the follow-up, preps you before calls, keeps your CRM tidy, surfaces real buying signals. It lives in Slack and Teams, wired into HubSpot, Gmail and Gong. Unlike horizontal agents, it is built for revenue teams, acts through your permissions, and your context and memory stay portable. No lock-in. Not another dashboard.

posts.name: PixFit
posts.tagline: Turn 1 creative into every ad format, instantly
posts.description: Senior Designers shouldn't be manually-resizing assets ready to run or being aware of TikTok safe zones. PixFit turns 1 key visual into every ad format — brand-perfect, platform-specific, ready to ship.

posts.name: Macro
posts.tagline: Unifies your work into one app with shared memory
posts.description: Macro is the all-in-one workspace that combines email, messages, docs, tasks, code, agents, calls, and CRM. With team-level memory, you can query your entire workspace and never lose context.

posts.name: Solaris
posts.tagline: Your company’s AI adoption and upskilling platform
posts.description: Solaris is an AI-native transformation platform that helps organisations build AI fluency across every team. Start with a fluency test to understand where people are today, then give each team tailored learning, practical use cases, workflow challenges, champions and adoption tracking. Solaris helps companies move from scattered AI experiments to measurable capability, so AI becomes part of how work actually gets done.

posts.name: Banger Mail
posts.tagline: Shared mailboxes for teams and AI agents
posts.description: Banger is a native Mac app for teams running shared inboxes like support@, sales@, and founder@. You and AI agents work the same mailboxes: agents triage, label, and draft with scoped access, while you review before anything sends. Connect your own domain or Google Workspace accounts, search everything, assign threads, and track work on a board. Early access: 14 days free, 2 mailboxes, 100 AI credits, no card. 500 spots now. Mac first, Windows and mobile next.

posts.name: PieterPost MCP
posts.tagline: Connect your AI agent to postal mail
posts.description: PieterPost MCP connects AI agents to postal mail. From ChatGPT, Claude, Codex, Claude Code, or any MCP client, agents can prepare letters and postcards, use Mailbook contacts, upload attachments or postcard images, create checkout links, and track orders. It brings PieterPost online mail, API, and payment-link workflows into agent tools.

posts.name: scritty
posts.tagline: Shared, searchable memory for every AI coding agent
posts.description: scritty is a terminal emulator that captures every CLI agent's conversation (Claude, Codex, Copilot, Antigravity, Ollama), indexes it into one searchable corpus you control, and serves it back to your agents over MCP and to you over the CLI. One session across desktop, browser, and mobile. Your captures stay on your machine.

makers.name: scritty
makers.headline: scritty maker. AI agent memory terminal

posts.name: Sidedoor
posts.tagline: Paste any job, find who in your network can refer you
posts.description: Sidedoor searches your Gmail, LinkedIn, Instagram, Twitter, Outlook, and friends' connections to find who can refer you to any job. Most people are surprised by who shows up. 100% free.

posts.name: html.contact
posts.tagline: A full form backend you can test before paying
posts.description: html.contact turns plain HTML forms into working email forms with attachments, logs, exports, API access, verified routing, domain allowlists, and spam controls. The Free plan is built so you can test the real setup before upgrading, not just sample a few features.

posts.name: EasyAR Mega
posts.tagline: Turn entire cities into your AR canvas.
posts.description: EasyAR Mega is a large-scale Visual Positioning System (VPS) that empowers developers to build persistent, centimeter-accurate AR experiences for cities, malls, and scenic spots with flexible data acquisition (phones, panoramic cameras, or scanners) and multi-terminal deployment.

posts.name: Macuse
posts.tagline: Give Your AI Superpowers on macOS
posts.description: Macuse is a native macOS app that connects Claude, Codex, Cursor, Raycast, and any MCP-compatible AI client to your Mac apps. It gives AI assistants local access to Calendar, Mail, Notes, Reminders, Messages, and real app control through Computer Use.

posts.name: Basedash Actions
posts.tagline: A BI tool that can take action for you
posts.description: Basedash answers questions about your data. Now it acts on them. Ask the agent to extend a trial, fix a record, or seed a demo org — it writes the SQL and runs it against any database an admin has enabled for edits. Ask it to update a Stripe subscription or create a HubSpot lead and it acts through any MCP tool you've connected. Every consequential action pauses for your approval, and every tool has its own permission. Skills chain it all into workflows. From answers to actions.

posts.name: Flowly
posts.tagline: A personal AI agent that runs on your desktop and iPhone
posts.description: Flowly's whole agent core is now open source (Apache-2.0). A personal AI agent that runs on your desktop and iPhone, uses the AI keys you already have, and keeps a private memory of your world that learns and corrects itself. Knows your world. Answers to you.

posts.name: Gaming Chat SDK by CometChat
posts.tagline: Chat drops into Unreal like it was always there
posts.description: Focus on building the game. We'll handle the chat. CometChat's Unreal SDK lets players talk to each other right inside the game, mid-match: 1:1 and group messaging, presence, moderation, and 40+ real-time delegates for messages, typing, and reactions. Full Blueprint and C++ support, so it fits your visual graph or your codebase. Ships with a chat panel and toggle button for your HUD, or build your own UI on CometChat's subsystem. Currently in beta, for Windows, macOS, iOS, and Android.

posts.name: Retrace
posts.tagline: Debug AI agents by replaying and forking runs
posts.description: Record, replay, fork & share AI agent executions. See every LLM call, tool invocation, and error your agent makes, then debug and iterate in seconds. Free for 1,000 traces/mo.

posts.name: Quick Sub 2: Video Subtitling
posts.tagline: Quick, creative video subtitling with direct canvas control.
posts.description: Quick Sub 2 is a streamlined macOS application built from the ground up in SwiftUI for creative video subtitling. Get independent control over text styling, container geometry, and rotation angles. Drag subtitle objects directly on the video canvas for perfect positioning, apply batch styles across multiple objects with a single command, and use a dynamic timeline that scales from 0.1x to 10x for precision timing. The application has full native Undo/Redo stacks andqsub2 file persistence.

posts.name: adsideō
posts.tagline: Ambient AI layer that works before you ask
posts.description: Adsideo understands your live context across your screen, meetings, writing, memory, and code. Instead of waiting for prompts, it quietly turns that context into useful actions like creating tasks, answering questions, drafting content, and fixing problems. Unlike chatbots, Adsideo works in the background of everyday computing, making AI feel natural, seamless, and accessible even for people who don’t actively use AI tools.

posts.name: ZCode
posts.tagline: The official harness for GLM-5.2
posts.description: ZCode is the official agentic development environment for GLM-5.2, built for long-running coding tasks with stable context, file edits, terminal and browser state, Git review, mobile Remote, bot control, BYOK, and macOS, Windows, and Linux apps.

posts.name: Nod
posts.tagline: The AI notepad for Mac that never joins as a bot
posts.description: Nod turns conversations on your Mac into clean notes you can search and ask across. No meeting bot, no stored audio, private by default.

posts.name: Slopdar
posts.tagline: Is it built, or is it slop?
posts.description: Paste any website link and get a Slop Score (0–100): hand-coded by a real dev, or vibe-coded / AI-generated? Receipts included.

posts.name: IconAudit
posts.tagline: Make your profile work for you
posts.description: IconAudit scores a public LinkedIn profile across 6 trust pillars — positioning, proof, visibility, demand, discoverability, and lead capture — and turns the gaps into a personalized action plan. Paste any public LinkedIn URL and get a SIGNAL score, letter grade, and rewrite-ready direction in minutes. Find unclear headlines, weak social proof, visibility gaps, and lead leaks before prospects, investors, or hiring leads make up their mind.

posts.name: SpellType
posts.tagline: Private Mac autocomplete you don’t have to learn or manage
posts.description: SpellType is Mac autocomplete for writing (not code) for people who want AI without a learning curve. It saves time in Slack, Gmail, Docs, Teams, ChatGPT, Claude and more with inline next words for replies, docs, notes, and updates, and stays quiet where it won’t help. A small local model stays fast on 8GB M1 Macs and is easy on battery. No Screen Recording, screenshots, screen-data uploads, cloud, app analytics, model picking, per-app setup, or clutter. Accept with Tab, or keep typing.

posts.name: TheDesignAI
posts.tagline: Design at the speed of thought
posts.description: Most AI tools generate pretty pictures or generic design. TDAI is design-first that generates production ready UI that increases the credibility of your product instead of making it look like just another random sloppy AI UX. Built for founders and teams who need real interface work done in seconds, not a creative brief cycle that takes weeks. No watermarks, no design degree required, three iterations included. This is the design tool a Head of Design would actually use.

posts.name: Prompt Shots
posts.tagline: Instantly scan, save and share AI prompts from your pocket
posts.description: Prompt Shots is a personal AI prompt library built for speed with realtime sync across mobile and web. It can scan a prompt from any screen with a camera and create a prompt instantly. The prompts are ready to share via QR, text, or email. The embedded AI-helper builds smart prompts with input on goal, role, tone etc. It provides a workspace to organize searchable prompts and chain multi-step prompts into workflows. It works with ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot, Perplexity, Grok & Meta AI.

posts.name: Boo
posts.tagline: Boo is a tiny ghost that tidies your Downloads
posts.description: Boo is a free, open source menu-bar app for macOS that quietly sorts your Downloads folder as files arrive. Known file types move into the right folder automatically, no setup, no rules to write. See a file type Boo hasn't met before? It pops up once, asks where it goes, then remembers for good. Native Swift, a couple MB, no Electron. Built because Downloads folders shouldn't be a landfill.

posts.name: ShukrAI: Vedic Astrology AI
posts.tagline: Real Vedic astrology, made beautiful, in your language.
posts.description: ShukrAI is a Vedic astrology app where every prediction ties to a real verse in the classical scriptures. 619 hand-researched rules, each cited. Your birth chart is computed with real astronomy (D1, D9, Vimshottari Dasha, panchang), and Google's Gemini only writes the wording. The AI never predicts, it just phrases what the math worked out. Free birth chart and daily reading. Built by three brothers over 18 months. One of us is a practicing Vedic astrologer, so the scholarship is real.

posts.name: YourMemory 2.0
posts.tagline: Your AI has the memory of a goldfish. Not anymore
posts.description: Most AI memory tools (Mem0, Zep, vector DBs) are storage with search, they hoard everything and bloat into noise. YourMemory behaves like a brain: 🧠 It consolidates related facts into clean summaries, so memory gets sharper, not bigger (444 → 16). ♻️ It recovers your agent's context after every reset. 🔒 It proves every change with a tamper-evident audit trail. 👥 It shares role-based team memory pools. Everyone else's store gets worse as it grows. Ours gets better.

posts.name: DodoForm v2
posts.tagline: AI forms that turn voice, photos & notes into clean data
posts.description: DodoForm 2.0 rebuilds intake around AI. New since v1: live voice-to-text that types straight into the form, photo/file extraction, a human review queue so AI never silently guesses, conversational analytics ("ask your data anything"), a dashboard Extractor for pasting messy data, and an AI-credit model with unlimited responses.

posts.name: Trama
posts.tagline: Custom React storefronts without backend migration
posts.description: Build a fast custom React storefront on Wix, Shopify, or Webflow without migrating your backend. Trama gives you one SDK for products, cart, and native checkout, plus mapping, monitoring, and site health so your store stays reliable after launch.

posts.name: Get Styli
posts.tagline: See how clothes look on you before you buy.
posts.description: Get Styli is the AI-powered virtual try-on app for consumers and fashion brands. Upload your photo and any outfit to see how it looks on you instantly. No dressing rooms needed.

posts.name: Aether DB
posts.tagline: AI-Powered Database Architecture
posts.description: Aether DB is the world's best AI-powered database schema generation tool. Build PostgreSQL databases, write TypeScript types, generate ERD diagrams, and create API routes instantly from plain English.

posts.name: Chum Wellness
posts.tagline: The modern mental health service platform.
posts.description: Chum Wellness is Bangladesh's premier mental health platform. We strip away the stigma of traditional care, connecting modern professionals with over 35 fully vetted, licensed clinical psychologists. Whether you need secure online telehealth from anywhere in the world or private in-person sessions in Dhaka, our platform provides evidence-based care (like CBT) tailored for corporate burnout, anxiety, and couples counseling. Mental health is your ultimate competitive advantage.

posts.name: Relevyn
posts.tagline: Track and fix how AI describes your brand
posts.description: Buyers now ask ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Gemini for recommendations before they Google you -- and most brands have no idea what those engines say back. Relevyn scans all four, scores your AI visibility 0-100, and shows you where you're invisible. Then it writes the content to fix it -- drafts, not just a dashboard. Track your score over time and see which competitors own the answers you don't. For founders and marketers who'd rather be the recommendation.

posts.name: Scripture Insight
posts.tagline: AI-powered Bible study. Any verse, deeply understood.
posts.description: Scripture Insight lets you type any Bible verse or topic and instantly get: The meaning in plain English Historical and cultural background A phrase-by-phrase breakdown Related scriptures Life application points It's free to use, works on any device, and is built for anyone who wants to go deeper in their Bible study whether you're a new believer or have read the Bible for years.

posts.name: Uptimepage
posts.tagline: Open-source monitoring + status page, driven as code.
posts.description: Most tools monitor OR run a status page, so you pay for two and wire them together. Uptimepage does both in one open-source tool: a failing check opens an incident and posts it to a branded status page. Free hosted tier, or self-host the single Rust binary.

posts.name: LidRun
posts.tagline: Keep AI working on your Mac — even with the lid closed
posts.description: A safety-aware Mac runtime for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Docker, Ollama and local LLMs — with closed-lid workflows, timers, charging-only mode, low-battery auto-stop and thermal guardrails. Built for developers who need to keep AI/dev jobs running on Mac, keep a Mac awake with the lid closed, or use a more guided alternative to blind wake locks like caffeinate.

posts.name: Font licensing made easy by FontBase
posts.tagline: Monitor and enforce font license compliance across your team
posts.description: Managing font usage and keeping up with commericial font licenses was always a pain. Not anymore. With FontBase Licensing, you can easily keep your team compliant. No complicated font server setup, no hidden setup fees, no subscription obligations. No AI. Just add your fonts to FontBase and create a license in 3 clicks. Then you can see who uses what fonts and monitor the usage amounts.

posts.name: OffShrimp — Local AI Posture Monitor
posts.tagline: Stop slouching — AI runs privately in your browser
posts.description: OffShrimp watches your posture through your camera and gently reminds you when you’ve been slouching. AI runs locally in your browser, so camera footage never leaves your device. Free, no sign-up, no installation.

posts.name: Font licensing made easy by FontBase
posts.tagline: Monitor and enforce font license compliance across your team
posts.description: Managing font usage and keeping up with commericial font licenses was always a pain. Not anymore. With FontBase Licensing, you can easily keep your team compliant. No complicated font server setup, no hidden setup fees, no subscription obligations. No AI. Just add your fonts to FontBase and create a license in 3 clicks. Then you can see who uses what fonts and monitor the usage amounts.

posts.name: ApplyHere
posts.tagline: Between a messy spreadsheet and a bloated ATS
posts.description: Post a job in minutes and collect applicants through a beautiful step-by-step flow. No subscription, no setup, no enterprise ATS. $9 per job, active for 4 weeks. Perfect for startups, founders, and indie teams.

posts.name: centree
posts.tagline: The ultimate all-in-one link for your portfolio & products
posts.description: Most bio-links just list URLs. Centree runs your entire digital business on a single page. What you can do with it: • Go Global: Visitors can translate your profile into 19 languages with one click. • Sell Directly: Built-in storefront and checkout to sell products with zero external apps. • Capture Leads: Collect emails, custom forms, and SMS natively from your dashboard. • 19 Content Types: Embed videos, music, tip jars, calendars, and social posts. Keep everything centered.

posts.name: Margin
posts.tagline: Turn the YT videos you watch into your next video idea
posts.description: Creators face two problems: you forget what you watch, and you run out of ideas. AI idea tools give generic filler. Analytics tell you what already happened. Note apps become a graveyard you never reopen. Margin connects them. It turns every video you watch into a clean Google Doc notes, timestamps, takeaways then mines your watch history for your next ideas: hooks, titles and angles built for your audience, not generic AI. Built solo, early — honest feedback wanted.

posts.name: Iwan Dock
posts.tagline: Floating app panels to replace your Dock & Launchpad
posts.description: Your Mac apps live in floating panels you arrange, lock, and summon on demand — grouped by project, client, or mood. Click an app and only your last window comes forward, never a pile of others. Native, sandboxed, no account. Free, with a $4.99 Pro unlock.

posts.name: Lumen 3D Marketing Studio
posts.tagline: Native macOS 3D studio for App Store screenshots & videos
posts.description: Native macOS app for indie developers who want cinematic 3D product visuals — without hiring a designer or learning Blender. Drop your screenshot or video into a photorealistic 3D device mockup, animate the camera, add custom lighting and backgrounds, and export in 4K 60fps — all locally on your Mac. Built for developers who ship quality apps but struggle to show it in their marketing. → Free to use. Pay only when you export ($15 once / $149 unlimited) → No subscription. No account. No cloud.

posts.name: KINETK
posts.tagline: The intelligence graph for the social web.
posts.description: KINETK turns the social web into a real-time IP Graph of creators, communities, and narratives — accessible through the KINETK API and MCP for AI agents, with continuous enrichment and provenance.

posts.name: Favicon Generator
posts.tagline: Create favicon PNG and ICO files in your browser
posts.description: Simple Favicon Generator is a free browser-based tool that creates favicon PNG files and a multi-size ICO file from a single image. Upload your logo or icon, choose the sizes you need, preview the results, and download everything as a ZIP or ICO in one click. Everything runs locally in your browser, so your images stay private. Perfect for websites, blogs, WordPress, and web apps.

posts.name: NodeBook
posts.tagline: Master backend engineering through Node.js
posts.description: The first two volumes of NodeBook are complete and free to read online. Volume 1, The Node.js Runtime, goes deep on the architecture, event loop, buffers, and streams that everything else sits on. Volume 2, Networking & Protocols, covers TCP, HTTP, sockets, DNS, and TLS down to the internals, not just the API surface. Every chapter pairs with runnable Node Runtime Labs, plus EPUB, PDFs, slides, and cheatsheets. Two volumes down, five on the way.

posts.name: eXo Platform 7.2
posts.tagline: A unified digital workplace powered by native AI
posts.description: eXo Platform 7.2 is an open-source digital workplace that unifies collaboration, communication, and knowledge management in one platform. This release introduces native AI inside everyday workflows, helping reduce tool fragmentation while keeping full control over data and infrastructure. Features include multi-LLM support, unified workspace, and flexible deployment (cloud, private cloud, on-premise). Built for organizations seeking modern collaboration without vendor lock-in.

posts.name: PixelPlay: M3U, Xtream Player
posts.tagline: Free live TV and IPTV for iPhone, iPad & tvOS.
posts.description: PixelPlay is an IPTV player built to feel like a first-party Apple app. It ships with 8,500 free public channels out of the box (news, sports, kids, international) from the iptv-org catalog — no sign-up, works on first launch. Add your own M3U or Xtream sources on top. Core features are free. Pro ($9.99 one-time, no subscription) unlocks multi-view (watch 4 streams simultaneously), Picture-in-Picture, unlimited sources, and parental locks.

posts.name: Split the Cost
posts.tagline: To every ext(cent)
posts.description: Data owned privately by your own Google Accounts with limited access scope to files created by this application. Quick to use for complicated splitting tasks with multiple people involved and complicated "who owes who what". Try for free even without sign-in but sign-in for persistence.

posts.name: MinervaAI
posts.tagline: AI that acts inside your knowledge base, not just chats
posts.description: MinervaAI is a second brain where AI doesn't just answer questions — it creates and edits notes, manages your Google Calendar, reads your Gmail, builds interactive widgets, and gives you a morning briefing based on what's in your vault. The AI gets to know you the more you use it and can suggest inefficiencies in what you are doing. It can build too - dashboards, holiday trackers, fitness trackers and more

posts.name: Pomodoro Focus Timer
posts.tagline: Meet your new focus buddy 🍅🌱
posts.description: Somewhere between "adulting" and "actually getting things done" 🍅 I built a Pomodoro timer where a tomato plant grows while you focus. Water it with your attention span 😄🌱 tomato-timer-grow.lovable.app Built with @lovable_dev

posts.name: Benchmap
posts.tagline: Trouve toujours bancs pour tes fesses avec Benchmap.
posts.description: T'es en galère de bancs ? Trouve toujours bancs pour tes fesses avec Benchmap.

posts.name: Sora UI
posts.tagline: Motion-first React components for the shadcn registry
posts.description: Sora UI is a motion-first React component registry on the shadcn model. Install @soralabs/* primitives with the CLI, own the code in your repo, and ship scroll reveals, text effects, magnetic UI, and more — powered by Motion and GSAP with reduced-motion support built in. Includes a docs MCP server so Cursor and Claude can search components and install guides while you build. Free to use at ui.soralabs.io.vn.

posts.name: ClippingPro
posts.tagline: AI that finds the best moments in any video
posts.description: The internet doesn't distribute videos. It distributes moments. ClippingPro is an AI that understands conversations, identifies the moments people are most likely to watch, share, and remember, then transforms long-form content into publish-ready clips in minutes. Stop searching timelines. Start creating more moments worth sharing.

posts.name: Inka QR Master
posts.tagline: QR codes, links, tracking, and campaigns - All in one place
posts.description: Most QR code tools are either too basic, too expensive, or too cluttered for daily business use. Inka QR is built for teams that need a clean, reliable QR code management system. You can create QR codes, customize them for your brand, organize them by campaign or use case, and manage everything from one dashboard.

posts.name: Launch Studio
posts.tagline: Free, open-source store & Product Hunt screenshots
posts.description: Launch Studio turns raw app screenshots into store-ready App Store, Google Play, and Product Hunt images. Frames, backgrounds and headlines, right in your browser. No sign-up, no upload, no AI in the render. Free and open source.

posts.name: Study Planner & Time Management Tool
posts.tagline: Turn homework into a personalized study plan.
posts.description: Turn homework into a personalized study plan. Add your assignments, estimated completion times, and priorities, then automatically generate an adaptive study schedule with built-in breaks. Customize how it plans, visualize your workload, and stay organized—all for free with no login required.

posts.name: LiveClassroom - Beta V1
posts.tagline: World's First Agentic AI Classroom
posts.description: LiveClassroom is an AI teaching platform that goes beyond static chat. Instead of only replying in text, it speaks, listens, and builds live visual explanations on an interactive canvas. It is built for students, instructors, and training teams who need faster understanding across complex topics like data science, math, compliance, and technical workflows.

posts.name: Growlance
posts.tagline: Your AI bidding co-pilot for Freelancer.com
posts.description: Growlance is a local-first AI bidding assistant and auto-bidder for Freelancer.com — it finds the right projects, drafts AI proposals, and tracks your clients using your own API keys. No subscription, no cloud, no telemetry. Buy once, run forever.

posts.name: Tokki Korean
posts.tagline: The ultimate toolkit for korean learners.
posts.description: No need to juggle multiple apps. Everything you need to learn Korean is right here. Tokki Korean brings together the essential tools for learning the Korean language in a single app. No account required, works offline, and respects your privacy. Build your vocabulary, study grammar, practice with flashcards, look up words in the dictionary, take TOPIK-style tests, read books, and watch YouTube videos with interactive subtitles... Download Tokki Korean and start learning today.

posts.name: Seenly
posts.tagline: Think like Lintree + Loom. Share it anywhere hr, dms, mails
posts.description: Create a beautiful professional profile with a short video introduction, projects, resume, and links all in one page. Share it anywhere, from job applications and cold emails to LinkedIn, DMs, and communities.

posts.name: Pincite
posts.tagline: Turbotax for Patents
posts.description: Patent work is tedious. Cross referencing a rulebook thousands of pages long, hunting claim errors, checking drawing numerals, tracking deadlines. Pincite automates that grind. It reviews your draft against actual rules, shows real rule text behind every finding, circles defects on your drawings, surfaces overlapping prior art, and exports a filing ready USPTO package. The tedious parts of the process are automatically handled but judgment and ideas come from the patent holder.

posts.name: Valmis
posts.tagline: Open-source alternative to Claude Cowork / OpenClaw for work
posts.description: Valmis is an OpenClaw alternative that is designed for work. You can think of it as an open-source alternative to Claude Cowork. You can connect to more than 100 business and productivity apps with your AI agent. The system is designed with security in mind, meaning the agent never gets access to your API credentials. All requests are made via proxy. Agents are dockerized so they can't access your host files. Valmis is designed to run on the cloud and collaborate with humans to get work done.

posts.name: Study Planner & Time Management Tool
posts.tagline: Turn homework into a personalized study plan.
posts.description: Turn homework into a personalized study plan. Add your assignments, estimated completion times, and priorities, then automatically generate an adaptive study schedule with built-in breaks. Customize how it plans, visualize your workload, and stay organized—all for free with no login required.

posts.name: Stargazer Bar
posts.tagline: Watch your GitHub stars climb, live in your menu bar
posts.description: Ship something, then watch it take off. Stargazer Bar shows your GitHub repo's stars and forks trending live in your Mac menu bar — an actual history from background checks as often as every 10 minutes, not a snapshot. Share a milestone screenshot or X post from the menu. Also tracks release downloads, a maintainer radar (CI/PRs/issues), and any public repo — no GitHub account required.

posts.name: Video Editing Controller
posts.tagline: Your phone as a wireless jog wheel for video editors
posts.description: Turn your phone into a wireless jog wheel and button controller for DaVinci Resolve, Premiere Pro, and Final Cut Pro. Free to download. Works over Wi-Fi.

makers.name: Bence Király
makers.headline: just another developer working on stuff

posts.name: TheInner.app
posts.tagline: The operating system for your inner world.
posts.description: Most of us repeat patterns in our relationships, emotions, and decisions without truly understanding why. TheInner.app helps you see those patterns clearly through 18 initial psychology-grounded self-assessments — all completely free. Each assessment gives you a full result, and as you complete more, the platform builds an evolving profile of who you are. You also get an AI Coach that understands your results and helps you reflect deeper along with the best journaling and integration experience.

posts.name: CLAPSTORM
posts.tagline: Free product launch platform — backed by claps, not cash
posts.description: A free product launch platform. Submit your product and let the community back it with claps — no waitlist, no paid placement, no pay-to-win.

posts.name: EarlyWise
posts.tagline: From screening to offer. Know before you go.
posts.description: Most AI tools help you apply faster. EarlyWise helps you decide smarter—before the interview. What's different: • Decision-first, not volume-first: evaluate if a role is worth your time • Risk analysis, not just matching: spot unclear expectations and red flags in the JD • Prep from first screening: tailored questions + company insights, not after the offer • Bilingual: English & Chinese Bottom line: Not another "apply faster" tool. The research assistant you wish you had.

posts.name: agent-coherence
posts.tagline: Stop AI agents from silently corrupting shared state
posts.description: Two AI agents (two sessions, or an agent and a script) read the same file and both write it back. The later write silently clobbers the first: no error, the work is just gone. agent-coherence is a drop-in guard that catches the stale read before the overwrite lands, so the stale writer is denied and re-reads first. It ships as an MCP server, a LangGraph store drop-in, and a Python library. Single-host today (2+ agents on one machine); cross-host is opt-in, demo-grade. Open source, TLA+-checked.
